happyThoughts.quote: I got a quick and accurate reply via email.
Thank you for the quick reply and great support!

turns.text: Merge profile
I'll help you merge your profiles. Let me transfer you to our duplicate profile specialist.
I can help you with that! To get started, which of the following best describes your situation?
My own duplicate profiles

Got it! I'll help you merge your own duplicate profiles.

Let me grab a few details to get this sorted for you:

1. What is your full name?
2. What is your location (city/country)?
3. Do you have the profile links or player IDs for both profiles? If not, the display names will work too.
4. What is the email address on the account you'd like to keep as your primary profile?
trying register for a tournament at pontchartraib racquet club that starts on june 20th but the system is not letting me

Got it — here help you get registered for that Pontchartrain Racquet Club tournament on June 20th.

Let me start with the most important detail: **What error message or issue are you seeing when you try to register?** For example, is it a payment error, an eligibility message, a page that won't load, or something else?
eligibility
Thanks for clarifying. **Are you logged into the correct UTR Sports account/profile** — the one you use for tournament play?
yes I have only one accout I have always used
Got it. Can you tell me **what the eligibility message says exactly?** That will help me figure out what's blocking your registration.
it says no event divisions are available for your registration due to player eligibility criteria

I see — that message typically means one of a few things. Let me ask a couple of quick questions to narrow it down:

1. **Does the tournament show any divisions at all when you look at it**, or does the entire event appear to have no divisions listed?

2. **Do you have an active Power subscription?** Some divisions require an Annual Power membership to register.
dont have power
That's likely the issue. Some divisions in that tournament may require a Power subscription to register. Let me search for more details on this.

That confirms it — **the divisions in this tournament likely require an Annual Power subscription to register.** Free members don't have access to those divisions.

You have two options:

**Option 1: Upgrade to Power**  
You can upgrade to a [Power Subscription](https://app.utrsports.net/power-perks?utm_source=stewart&utm_medium=chat&utm_campaign=power_perks&utm_content=stewart_power) and then register for the tournament. Power members save on event fees and get other exclusive features.

**Option 2: Contact the tournament organizer**  
If you believe you should be eligible for a free division at this event, you can reach out to Pontchartrain Racquet Club directly — they may have open divisions that don't require Power.

Does one of those work for you, or would you like me to escalate this to our support team to investigate further?
Score from a UTR Sports event

Got it — let me pull up the right steps for that.

What's the issue with the score? Is it missing entirely, showing the wrong score, showing the wrong opponent, or appearing as a duplicate?
I never played a UTR match and yet there are two matches [location]my profile

This sounds like the matches may have landed on a duplicate profile of yours, or there's been an error. Let me help clarify:

**First, a quick check:** Did you ever create a second UTR account or profile, or is it possible these matches were added to a different profile with a similar name?

If you have two separate profiles for yourself and one contains matches you didn't play, the best path is a **profile merge** — we can combine them so all your correct results are in one place. That's different from a missing-score issue.

Can you confirm: Are these two matches on the same profile you're using now, or are they on a different UTR profile altogether?

They are in my current profile. I see them as logged to my profile page (https://app.utrsports.net/profiles/5643219). I have never had a UTR account before or played a UTR game. very [location]so this might have been the cuase for this error

Got it — those two June matches on your profile don't belong to you. Since they're showing on your current profile and you've never played a UTR event, this does sound like a data mix-up, likely due to a name match.

I'll need to escalate this to our team so they can investigate and remove those matches from your profile. Before I submit a ticket, let me confirm what I have:

- **Your name:** (as it appears on your UTR profile)
- **Your email:** (the one associated with your UTR account)

Once I have those, I'll send this over and our team will get those incorrect matches removed.
